task_completion.description: Open the Tor state file to find the Entry Guard fingerprint
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or text editor window displaying the contents of the Tor 'state' file, showing lines that include 'EntryGuard' and a 40-character hex string.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Tor Relay Search tool
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser window open to the URL 'https://metrics.torproject.org/rs.html'.

task_completion.description: Search for the Entry Guard fingerprint
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Tor Relay Search page with a 40-character hex string (fingerprint) entered into the search field.

task_completion.description: View the relay details for the searched fingerprint
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Tor Relay Search results page displaying the details of the searched relay, specifically showing the Country and AS Name.

task_completion.description: Create or open the guard audit text file
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window indicating the file '/home/ga/Documents/guard_audit.txt' is being created or edited.

task_completion.description: Document the Entry Guard details in the required format
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contains the exact header '=== ENTRY GUARD AUDIT ===' followed by 'Fingerprint:', 'Country:', and 'AS Name:' with their respective values filled in.

integrity.description: The agent used a real web browser to search for the relay details
integrity.visual_evidence: A GUI web browser is used to navigate to metrics.torproject.org, rather than using terminal commands like curl or python scripts to bypass GUI interaction.

integrity.description: The searched fingerprint matches the one from the state file
integrity.visual_evidence: The 40-character hex string searched in the browser is identical to the one found in the Tor state file.

integrity.description: The documented relay details match the search results
integrity.visual_evidence: The Country and AS Name entered into the audit text file exactly match the information displayed on the Tor Relay Search results page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target output file must be exactly at /home/ga/Documents/guard_audit.txt. The agent must visit metrics.torproject.org to search for the Tor node fingerprint.
